name: Aeon.Find
description: Get essay recommendations while reading Aeon.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https: data:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src https://aeon-latest.onrender.com
